description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image and set GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository's .gradle directory in before_script. Define two stages, build and test, and set GRADLE_OPTS to disable the daemon. In the build stage add a build job that runs `gradle --build-cache assemble` and publishes the `build/libs` directory as an artifact that expires after one day. In the test stage add a test job that depends on the build job, runs `gradle check` and then extracts the coverage percentage with `grep -Eo "Total.*?%" build/reports/jacoco/test/html/index.html`. No special rules or services are required.
